title: SithMiningPack
description: This project adds my texture pack. It presents a simplistic view more easier on the eyes than other texture packs and base game.
body: This is my first pack, it makes most blocks relevant in Tunnels to a single color, helping the eyes and new ping gliders.![Cover Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b35190155c74cdedc104a73caf9818193b46c88_0.webp)
